name: iridium-reporting-codex
description: Connect Codex to Iridium business reporting for an account.

interface.shortDescription: Create account-scoped business intelligence reports in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to an Iridium Reporting Agent through secure OAuth and MCP. The plugin contains no private account data or setup credentials.
defaultPrompt: Use Iridium Reporting to prepare a business update for this account.
Ask Iridium Reporting what changed across account activity and intelligence.
